scope: wave2 fan-out migration: all 4 legacy-parity read streams (accounts, leads, visits, custom_feeds); every other Leadfeeder resource (users, feed rules, webhook/integration management, and all write/mutation endpoints) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /accounts/{account_id}/users, feed-rule and webhook/integration management endpoints is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
